title: WHAT RESULTS WILL YOU GET AFTER A REGRESSION SESSION?
subtitle: Regression therapy helps achieve deep transformations and improve quality of life in various areas
imageAlt: Results of regression therapy - meditation and inner peace

results.0: Release from anxiety, fears, and phobias
results.1: Resolution of internal conflicts and contradictions
results.4: Understanding the causes of recurring life scenarios
results.6: Discovery of new opportunities and perspectives
results.9: Finding answers to important life questions

quote: Regression therapy is not just a journey into the past; it's a path to a better future through healing the present.
